title: Click Opener Continued!
description: Use blocks like shulkers directly in your inventory!
body:
_Continuation of [Click Opener Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickopener) by Hoid2._  
### Overview
This mod allows you to open blocks in your inventory!  
  
Keep blocks like shulkerboxes, enchanting tables, anvils and crafting tables with you for quick and easy access.  
With this mod, shulkerboxes can become a vanilla-friendly version of backpacks.  
  
The config allows for whitelisting and blacklisting of blocks. Keep in mind that none are whitelisted by default.  
You can use commands to add to the whitelist. For a full list, refer to the wiki in the sidebar!
### Legal
This is a fork of [Click Opener Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickopener) by Hoid2, created with permission by them.  
As such, it inherits its MIT License.
